svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Constructors and Destructors</text>
  
  <!-- Constructor Box -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Constructor
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Object Creation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Destructor Box -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Destructor
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Object Cleanup
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Object Lifecycle Timeline -->
  <line x1="60" y1="150" x2="360" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="210" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Object Lifecycle
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Constructor Call -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="180" r="8" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="100" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Constructor Called
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Object Usage -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="180" r="8" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Object in Use
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Destructor Call -->
  <circle cx="320" cy="180" r="8" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="320" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Destructor Called
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Memory Allocation -->
  <rect x="50" y="240" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Memory Allocated
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Memory Release -->
  <rect x="270" y="240" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Memory Freed
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Constructor to Memory -->
  <path d="M110 100 Q110 150 100 240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,4" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Destructor to Memory -->
  <path d="M310 100 Q310 150 320 240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,4" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
</svg>
